PowerShell($ip = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://checkip.amazonaws.com'\).Trim\(\); Write-Output "Public IP: $ip"; Write-Output "CIDR for SG rule: $ip/32")

PowerShell($content = Get-Content -Raw -Path 'pervaxis-forge-api/contract/openapi.json'; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\(\(Resolve-Path 'pervaxis-forge-api/contract/openapi.json'\), $content, \(New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false\)\); $b = Get-Content -Encoding Byte -ReadCount 3 -TotalCount 3 -Path 'pervaxis-forge-api/contract/openapi.json'; Write-Output \("First bytes: 0x{0:X2} 0x{1:X2} 0x{2:X2}" -f $b[0], $b[1], $b[2]\))
